name: John Dewey
description: American philosopher, psychologist, and educational reformer (1859–1952)
abstract: John Dewey (; October 20, 1859 – June 1, 1952) was an American philosopher, psychologist, and educational reformer. He was one of the most prominent American scholars in the first half of the twentieth century.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Rose
about_quotes.evidence: And the government made it possible for me to interview Albert Einstein and John Dewey. And this is how I met Rivera, too.

about_quotes.speaker: Yusef Lateef
about_quotes.evidence: Like John Dewey said in his lectures at Harvard in, I think in the early-30’s, Art as Experience lectures
about_quotes.doc_title: Yusef Lateef — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
